description: Create a WMS decoration layout named 'report_map' in the GeoServer data directory of the 'gs-app' container. The layout file at 'layouts/report_map.xml' must include a 'scaleline' decoration at the bottom-left (10px offset) and a 'text' decoration at the top-right (10px offset) with the message '© Natural Earth Data'. Generate and save an undecorated map image of 'ne:ne_countries' (EPSG:4326, 800x400) to '/home/ga/map_undecorated.png'. Additionally, generate a decorated map image using the 'report_map' layout with the same parameters and save it to '/home/ga/map_decorated.png'.
